info.title: GmailMcp
info.description: Dual-mode Gmail integration tool supporting both direct CLI operations and MCP server mode for AI assistants. Search messages, read emails, and download attachments via command line or Model Context Protocol.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Gmail MCP Server - Dual-mode CLI and MCP integration for Gmail

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search Gmail messages using Gmail query syntax

arguments.name: query
arguments.description: Search query using Gmail syntax (e.g., 'from:user@example.com subject:invoice')

commands.name: read
commands.description: Read a specific Gmail message by ID

arguments.name: message-id
arguments.description: Unique identifier of the message to read

commands.name: download
commands.description: Download an attachment from a Gmail message

arguments.name: message-id
arguments.description: Unique identifier of the message containing the attachment

arguments.name: attachment-id
arguments.description: Unique identifier of the attachment to download

commands.name: mcp
commands.description: Start MCP server for AI assistant integration via stdio
